blocks.instructions: As many rounds as possible in 5 minutes. Score = rounds + reps.

blocks.name: 08:00 - 09:00 - Transition
blocks.instructions: 1 minute forced rest.

blocks.name: 09:00 - 11:00 - Row Test
blocks.instructions: Max metres in 2 minutes. Note your distance as Score 3.

title: Atom
description: Four rounds of a barbell complex, then max distance on the rower with whatever time remains. The barbell will cost you - how much is up to you.

blocks.name: For Time (10 min cap)
blocks.instructions: 4 rounds for time. Bar weight: 70kg/50kg. Note your finish time, then immediately move to the rower for max distance in remaining time.

blocks.name: Max Distance Row
blocks.instructions: Row for max metres in the remaining time. Score 1 = chipper finish time. Score 2 = metres rowed.

blocks.name: For Time (10 min cap)
blocks.instructions: 4 rounds for time. Bar weight: 60kg/42.5kg. Note your finish time, then immediately move to the rower for max distance in remaining time.

blocks.name: Max Distance Row
blocks.instructions: Row for max metres in the remaining time. Score 1 = chipper finish time. Score 2 = metres rowed.

blocks.name: For Time (10 min cap)
blocks.instructions: 4 rounds for time. Bar weight: 50kg/35kg. Note your finish time, then immediately move to the rower for max distance in remaining time.

blocks.name: Max Distance Row
blocks.instructions: Row for max metres in the remaining time. Score 1 = chipper finish time. Score 2 = metres rowed.

blocks.name: For Time (10 min cap)
blocks.instructions: 4 rounds for time. Bar weight: 40kg/27.5kg. Note your finish time, then immediately move to the rower for max distance in remaining time.

blocks.name: Max Distance Row
blocks.instructions: Row for max metres in the remaining time. Score 1 = chipper finish time. Score 2 = metres rowed.

title: Dead Thruster
description: A seven-minute barbell and kettlebell AMRAP. Heavy deadlifts into overhead work - the later movements will expose any fatigue you built in the first two.

blocks.name: 7 Min AMRAP
blocks.instructions: As many rounds as possible in 7 minutes. Score = rounds + reps.

blocks.name: 7 Min AMRAP
blocks.instructions: As many rounds as possible in 7 minutes. Score = rounds + reps.
movements: 25 Chest to Bar Pull Ups / Pull Ups

title: The 600m Sting
description: It reads like a chipper... but it's not.

blocks.instructions:
Run 600m. Into: 10 Chest to Bar Pullups, 10 Burpee Box Jump Over, 10 Toes to Bar, 10 Box Jumps. Add 2 reps to each movement until 09:00.

SCORE 1.1 = 600m Run Time
SCORE 1.2 = Reps
movements: Add 2 reps to each movement until 09:00 - score total reps as 1.2

blocks.instructions:
Run 600m. Into: 8 Pullups, 8 Burpee Box Jump Over, 8 Toes to Bar, 8 Box Jumps. Add 2 reps to each movement until 09:00.

SCORE 1.1 = 600m Run Time
SCORE 1.2 = Reps
movements: Add 2 reps to each movement until 09:00 - score total reps as 1.2

blocks.instructions:
Run 600m. Into: 8 American Kettlebell Swings (20kg/12kg), 8 Burpee Box Step Up, 8 Hanging Leg Raises, 8 Box Jumps / Step Up. Add 2 reps to each movement until 09:00.

SCORE 1.1 = 600m Run Time
SCORE 1.2 = Reps
movements: Add 2 reps to each movement until 09:00 - score total reps as 1.2

title: Double Trouble
description: A descending chipper built around overhead endurance and rope skills. Opens and closes with double unders. The middle third is where it breaks people.

blocks.name: For Time (11 min cap)
blocks.instructions: Complete all movements in order. Score = finish time. If you hit the timecap, score = 11:00.

blocks.name: For Time (11 min cap)
blocks.instructions: Complete all movements in order. Score = finish time. If you hit the timecap, score = 11:00.

blocks.name: For Time (11 min cap)
blocks.instructions: Complete all movements in order. Score = finish time. If you hit the timecap, score = 11:00.

title: Snatch and Walk
description: A descending chipper built around snatches and handstand walks. The double unders drop each round - the handstand walk distance does too, but it won't feel like it.

blocks.name: For Time (7 min cap)
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Snatch load: 60kg/40kg. Score = finish time, or 'cap' if you do not finish.

movements.note: second round
third round

blocks.name: For Time (7 min cap)
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Snatch load: 55kg/35kg. Score = finish time, or 'cap' if you do not finish.

movements.note: second round
third round

title: Seeding: The Gauntlet
description: Three sequential chippers, each with its own timecap. Descending reps, ascending difficulty. Note your finish time for each block separately.

blocks.name: Block 1 - 6 Min Cap
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Score your finish time for this block.

blocks.name: Block 2 - 5 Min Cap
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Score your finish time for this block. Note your time at the 9 Box Jumps if you do not finish.
movements: 9 Box Jumps (24"/20") - note time here if needed

blocks.name: Block 3 - 4 Min Cap
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Score your finish time for this block. Note your time at the 9 Burpee Box Jump Overs if you do not finish.
movements: 9 Burpee Box Jump Overs (30"/24") - note time here if needed

title: The Ladder Carry
description: An ascending AMRAP. Distance and reps climb every round. Kettlebell cycling and grip are the limiters - pace the carries early.

blocks.name: 8 Min AMRAP
blocks.instructions: Complete each round in order. Every round, add 2 reps to the shuttle distance and 2 reps to the Toes to Bar. Kettlebells: 24kg/16kg. Toes to Bar start at 12 reps. Score = rounds + reps.
movements: 2x8m Double KB Front Rack Alternating Forward Lunges (24kg/16kg)

movements.note: add 2 reps to distance and Toes to Bar each round

movements: 4x8m Double KB Front Rack Alternating Forward Lunges (24kg/16kg)

movements.note: continue adding reps until time is up

blocks.name: 8 Min AMRAP
blocks.instructions: Complete each round in order. Every round, add 2 reps to the shuttle distance and 2 reps to the Toes to Bar. Kettlebells: 20kg/12kg. Toes to Bar start at 8 reps. Score = rounds + reps.
movements: 2x8m Double KB Front Rack Alternating Forward Lunges (20kg/12kg)

movements.note: add 2 reps to distance and Toes to Bar each round

movements: 4x8m Double KB Front Rack Alternating Forward Lunges (20kg/12kg)

movements.note: continue adding reps until time is up

blocks.name: 8 Min AMRAP
blocks.instructions: Complete each round in order. Every round, add 2 reps to the shuttle distance and 2 reps to the Hanging Leg Raises. Kettlebells: 16kg/8kg. Hanging Leg Raises start at 8 reps. Score = rounds + reps.
movements: 2x8m Double KB Front Rack Alternating Forward Lunges (16kg/8kg)

movements.note: Add 2 reps to distance and Hanging Leg Raises each round

movements: 4x8m Double KB Front Rack Alternating Forward Lunges (16kg/8kg)

movements.note: continue adding reps until time is up

title: Row, Bag and Bell
description: A three-part workout with two rowing tests bookending a sandbag and kettlebell chipper. Pace the chipper - the second row will find you out.

blocks.name: Part 1 - 2 Min Row Test
blocks.instructions: Max metres in 2 minutes. Note your distance as Score 1.

blocks.name: Transition
blocks.instructions: 1 minute forced rest. Set up for the chipper.

blocks.name: Part 2 - 7 Min Cap Chipper
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Kettlebells: 24kg/16kg. Sandbag: 70kg/50kg. Note your finish time as Score 2, or 'cap' if you do not finish.

movements.note: second round
third round

blocks.name: Transition
blocks.instructions: 1 minute forced rest. Get back on the rower.

blocks.name: Part 3 - 1 Min Row Test
blocks.instructions: Max metres in 1 minute. Note your distance as Score 3.

blocks.name: Part 1 - 2 Min Row Test
blocks.instructions: Max metres in 2 minutes. Note your distance as Score 1.

blocks.name: Transition
blocks.instructions: 1 minute forced rest. Set up for the chipper.

blocks.name: Part 2 - 7 Min Cap Chipper
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Kettlebells: 20kg/12kg. Sandbag: 50kg/30kg. Note your finish time as Score 2, or 'cap' if you do not finish.

movements.note: second round
third round

blocks.name: Transition
blocks.instructions: 1 minute forced rest. Get back on the rower.

blocks.name: Part 3 - 1 Min Row Test
blocks.instructions: Max metres in 1 minute. Note your distance as Score 3.

blocks.name: Part 1 - 2 Min Row Test
blocks.instructions: Max metres in 2 minutes. Note your distance as Score 1.

blocks.name: Transition
blocks.instructions: 1 minute forced rest. Set up for the chipper.

blocks.name: Part 2 - 7 Min Cap Chipper
blocks.instructions: Complete all reps in order for time. Kettlebells: 16kg/8kg. Sandbag: 50kg/30kg. Note your finish time as Score 2, or 'cap' if you do not finish.

movements.note: second round
third round

blocks.name: Transition

blocks.name: Part 3 - 1 Min Row Test

title: Clean Complex Meet Chipper
description: A two-part barbell workout. Six minutes to find your heaviest complex, then straight into a barbell chipper against the clock. The load you pick in part one will follow you into part two.

blocks.name: 00:00 - 06:00 -  Complex
blocks.instructions: Build to a maximum weight for the complex in 6 minutes. Complete as many attempts as needed. Score 1 = heaviest successful complex load (kg).

blocks.name: 06:00 - 07:00 - Transition
blocks.instructions: 1 minute forced rest. Deload/Load your bar for Part 2 at 70kg/50kg.

blocks.name: 07:00 - 12:00 - Capped Chipper
blocks.instructions: 5 rounds for time. Bar weight: 70kg/50kg. Score 2 = finish time, or 'cap' if you do not finish.
